Book a CourtNew to Pickleball?

Junior Summer Camp

Posted by
Mike Proulx
April 12, 2026

Junior Academy Summer Camp

July 7-August 14, 2026 (6-Week Session)

Let New England Pickleball Club’s Junior Academy help your child grow and develop their game this summer. Our six-week camp blends skill-building clinics with fun and competitive opportunities so players improve technique, court awareness, and match play confidence in a supportive, team-focused environment. All clinics will be led by our Academy Director, Ryann Foster Da Silva, and our junior open plays will be led by one of our NEPC staff members each week.

Registration

Register now as we have limited spots to maintain small-group instruction to maximize growth.

  • Tuesday, July 7th (ages 8-11)
  • Thursday, July 9th (ages 12-16)
  • Friday, July 10th Open Play (ages 8-11)
  • Friday, July 10th Open Play (ages 12-16)‍
  • Friday, August 21st Pizza Party

Pricing

Drop-in pricing
  • Tuesday Clinic (Ages 8–11) // 3:30 PM–5:00 PM: Open to a max of 8 participants — $40 per player (child of member) / $50 per player (non-member)
  • Thursday Clinic  (Ages 12–16) // 3:30 PM–5:00 PM: Open to a max of 8 participants  — $40 per player (child of member) / $50 per player (non-member)
  • Friday Open Play 3:30 PM–5:00 PM // $15 per player (child of member) / $20 per player (non-member)
6-week package pricing
  • Member Package: (designed for children of NEPC members)
    • Pay for 6 week package and get 1 week free!
    • Includes age appropriate clinic and open play each week for six weeks
    • $275.00
  • Non-Member Package:
    • Pay for 6 week package and get 1 week free!
    • Includes age appropriate clinic and open play each week for six weeks
    • $350.00
Junior Pizza Party: $30

Close out the summer with our Junior Pizza Party on Friday August 21st from 3:30pm-5:30pmIncludes:

  • 1.5 hrs of on court social play, fun team-building games, music & more.
  • 30 minutes of pizza, water, and snacks provided by NEPC (gluten free pizza available upon request)

‍
